title: aglaia multinervis
intro: Aglaia multinervis, also known as the Java aglaia or red chestnut, is a species of plant in the family Meliaceae, native to Indonesia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aglaia multinervis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infectious diseases. Aglaia multinervis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in Indonesia to treat a range of ailments.
